SEARCH

Index

A C D E F G H L M O R S T U V W 
All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

A

addEvent() - Method in class RunTicketMiner
Prompts the admin for all required event fields (type, name, date, time, and tier prices) and adds the new event to the event map.
addUser() - Method in class RunTicketMiner
Prompts the admin to choose a user type (Customer, Organizer, or Admin) and delegates to the appropriate registration method.
addVenue() - Method in class RunTicketMiner
Prompts the admin for all required venue fields (type, name, capacity, costs, and seating section percentages) and adds the new venue to the venue map.
Admin - Class in model.users
Represents an Admin user in the TicketMiner system.
Admin() - Constructor for class model.users.Admin
Constructs a default Admin with no initial field values.
Admin(int, String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class model.users.Admin
Constructs an Admin with the specified identity and authentication details.
adminMenu() - Method in class RunTicketMiner
Displays the admin menu loop, providing options to manage users, venues, events, or logout.
Arena - Class in model.venues
Represents an Arena venue in the TicketMiner system.
Arena() - Constructor for class model.venues.Arena
Constructs a default Arena with no initial field values.
Arena(int, String, String, int, int, double, int, int, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class model.venues.Arena
Constructs an Arena with the specified identity, capacity, cost, and seating section percentages.
Auditorium - Class in model.venues
Represents an Auditorium venue in the TicketMiner system.
Auditorium() - Constructor for class model.venues.Auditorium
Constructs a default Auditorium with no initial field values.
Auditorium(int, String, String, int, int, double, int, int, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class model.venues.Auditorium
Constructs an Auditorium with the specified identity, capacity, cost, and seating section percentages.

C

Concert - Class in model.events
 
Concert() - Constructor for class model.events.Concert
Constructs a default Concert with no initial field values.
Concert(int, String, String, String, String, double, double, double, double, double) - Constructor for class model.events.Concert
Constructs a Concert with the specified scheduling and pricing details.
Customer - Class in model.users
Represents a Customer user in the TicketMiner system.
Customer() - Constructor for class model.users.Customer
Constructs a default Customer with no initial field values.
Customer(int, String, String, String, String, String, double, boolean, int) - Constructor for class model.users.Customer
Constructs a Customer with the specified user details and account information.
customerMenu() - Method in class RunTicketMiner
Displays the customer-facing menu.

D

DataManager - Class in utility
 
DataManager() - Constructor for class utility.DataManager
 
deleteEvent() - Method in class RunTicketMiner
Looks up an event by ID, name, or date and removes it from the event map after a confirmation prompt.
deleteUser() - Method in class RunTicketMiner
Looks up a user by ID, username, or full name and removes them from the user map after a confirmation prompt.
deleteVenue() - Method in class RunTicketMiner
Looks up a venue by ID, name, or type and removes it from the venue map after a confirmation prompt.
displayMainMenu() - Method in class RunTicketMiner
Displays the top-level menu and routes the user to registration or login until they choose to exit.

E

Event - Class in model.events
Abstract base class representing a generic event in the TicketMiner system.
Event() - Constructor for class model.events.Event
Constructs a default Event with no initial field values.
Event(int, String, String, String, String, double, double, double, double, double) - Constructor for class model.events.Event
Constructs an Event with the specified scheduling and pricing details.

F

findEvents(HashMap<Integer, Event>, String) - Method in class utility.DataManager
Searches the event map for events matching the given query.
findUsers(HashMap<String, User>, String) - Method in class utility.DataManager
Searches the user map for users matching the given query.
findVenues(HashMap<Integer, Venue>, String) - Method in class utility.DataManager
Searches the venue map for venues matching the given query.

G

generateUniqueEventId() - Method in class utility.DataManager
Increments and returns the next unique event ID based on the highest ID seen during load.
generateUniqueUserId() - Method in class utility.DataManager
Increments and returns the next unique user ID based on the highest ID seen during load.
generateUniqueVenueId() - Method in class utility.DataManager
Increments and returns the next unique venue ID based on the highest ID seen during load.
getBronzePercent() - Method in class model.venues.Venue
Returns the percentage of seats allocated to the Bronze section.
getBronzePrice() - Method in class model.events.Event
Returns the price for a Bronze ticket to this event.
getCapacity() - Method in class model.venues.Venue
Returns the general seating capacity of this venue.
getConcertCapacity() - Method in class model.venues.Venue
Returns the concert-specific seating capacity of this venue.
getConcertsPurchased() - Method in class model.users.Customer
Returns the number of events (concerts) this customer has purchased tickets for.
getCost() - Method in class model.venues.Venue
Returns the rental cost for this venue.
getDate() - Method in class model.events.Event
Returns the scheduled date of this event.
getEventID() - Method in class model.events.Event
Returns the unique identifier for this event.
getEventName() - Method in class model.events.Event
Returns the name of this event.
getFirstName() - Method in class model.users.User
Returns the first name of this user.
getGeneralAdmissionPercent() - Method in class model.venues.Venue
Returns the percentage of seats allocated to the General Admission section.
getGeneralAdmissionPrice() - Method in class model.events.Event
Returns the price for a General Admission ticket to this event.
getGoldPercent() - Method in class model.venues.Venue
Returns the percentage of seats allocated to the Gold section.
getGoldPrice() - Method in class model.events.Event
Returns the price for a Gold ticket to this event.
getLastName() - Method in class model.users.User
Returns the last name of this user.
getMoneyAvailable() - Method in class model.users.Customer
Returns the amount of money currently available in this customer's account.
getName() - Method in class model.venues.Venue
Returns the name of this venue.
getPassword() - Method in class model.users.User
Returns the password for this user.
getReservedPercent() - Method in class model.venues.Venue
Returns the percentage of seats allocated to the Reserved section.
getSilverPercent() - Method in class model.venues.Venue
Returns the percentage of seats allocated to the Silver section.
getSilverPrice() - Method in class model.events.Event
Returns the price for a Silver ticket to this event.
getTime() - Method in class model.events.Event
Returns the scheduled time of this event.
getType() - Method in class model.events.Event
Returns the type of this event (e.g., Sport, Concert, Special).
getType() - Method in class model.venues.Venue
Returns the type of this venue (e.g., Arena, Stadium, Open Air, Auditorium).
getUserID() - Method in class model.users.User
Returns the unique numeric identifier for this user.
getUsername() - Method in class model.users.User
Returns the username used to identify and authenticate this user.
getUserType() - Method in class model.users.User
Returns the role/type of this user (e.g., Customer, Organizer, Admin).
getVenueID() - Method in class model.venues.Venue
Returns the unique identifier for this venue.
getVipPercent() - Method in class model.venues.Venue
Returns the percentage of seats allocated to the VIP section.
getVipPrice() - Method in class model.events.Event
Returns the price for a VIP ticket to this event.

H

hasMembership() - Method in class model.users.Customer
Returns whether this customer holds an active membership.

L

loadEvents(String) - Method in class utility.DataManager
Reads a CSV file of events and populates a map keyed by event ID.
loadUsers(String) - Method in class utility.DataManager
Reads a CSV file of users and populates a map keyed by username.
loadVenues(String) - Method in class utility.DataManager
Reads a CSV file of venues and populates a map keyed by venue ID.
logAction(String) - Static method in class utility.Logger
Appends the specified action detail to the log file (data/ticketMinerLogger.txt).
Logger - Class in utility
 
Logger() - Constructor for class utility.Logger
 
login() - Method in class RunTicketMiner
Handles the login flow by prompting for username and password, validating credentials, and routing the authenticated user to the appropriate role menu.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class RunTicketMiner
Entry point for the TicketMiner application.
manageEvents() - Method in class RunTicketMiner
Displays the event management sub-menu, allowing an admin to add, view, update, or delete events.
manageUsers() - Method in class RunTicketMiner
Displays the user management sub-menu, allowing an admin to add, view, update, or delete users.
manageVenues() - Method in class RunTicketMiner
Displays the venue management sub-menu, allowing an admin to add, view, update, or delete venues.
model.events - package model.events
 
model.users - package model.users
 
model.venues - package model.venues
 

O

OpenAir - Class in model.venues
Represents an Open Air venue in the TicketMiner system.
OpenAir() - Constructor for class model.venues.OpenAir
Constructs a default OpenAir venue with no initial field values.
OpenAir(int, String, String, int, int, double, int, int, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class model.venues.OpenAir
Constructs an OpenAir venue with the specified identity, capacity, cost, and seating section percentages.
Organizer - Class in model.users
Represents an Organizer user in the TicketMiner system.
Organizer() - Constructor for class model.users.Organizer
Constructs a default Organizer with no initial field values.
Organizer(int, String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class model.users.Organizer
Constructs an Organizer with specified identity and authentication details.
organizerMenu() - Method in class RunTicketMiner
Displays the organizer-facing menu.

R

registerAdmin() - Method in class RunTicketMiner
Prompts the user for all required fields and registers a new Admin account, adding it to the in-memory user map.
registerCustomer() - Method in class RunTicketMiner
Prompts the user for all required fields and registers a new Customer account, adding it to the in-memory user map.
registerOrganizer() - Method in class RunTicketMiner
Prompts the user for all required fields and registers a new Organizer account, adding it to the in-memory user map.
RunTicketMiner - Class in Unnamed Package
 
RunTicketMiner() - Constructor for class RunTicketMiner
 

S

saveUpdatedData() - Method in class RunTicketMiner
Writes the current state of all maps (events, users, venues) to new CSV output files.
setBronzePercent(int) - Method in class model.venues.Venue
Sets the percentage of seats allocated to the Bronze section.
setCapacity(int) - Method in class model.venues.Venue
Sets the general seating capacity of this venue.
setConcertCapacity(int) - Method in class model.venues.Venue
Sets the concert-specific seating capacity of this venue.
setConcertsPurchased(int) - Method in class model.users.Customer
Sets the number of events (concerts) this customer has purchased tickets for.
setCost(double) - Method in class model.venues.Venue
Sets the rental cost for this venue.
setDate(String) - Method in class model.events.Event
Sets the scheduled date of this event.
setEventID(int) - Method in class model.events.Event
Sets the unique identifier for this event.
setEventName(String) - Method in class model.events.Event
Sets the name of this event.
setFirstName(String) - Method in class model.users.User
Sets the first name of this user.
setGeneralAdmissionPercent(int) - Method in class model.venues.Venue
Sets the percentage of seats allocated to the General Admission section.
setGoldPercent(int) - Method in class model.venues.Venue
Sets the percentage of seats allocated to the Gold section.
setLastName(String) - Method in class model.users.User
Sets the last name of this user.
setMembership(boolean) - Method in class model.users.Customer
Sets the membership status for this customer.
setMoneyAvailable(double) - Method in class model.users.Customer
Sets the amount of money available in this customer's account.
setName(String) - Method in class model.venues.Venue
Sets the name of this venue.
setPassword(String) - Method in class model.users.User
Sets the password for this user.
setReservedPercent(int) - Method in class model.venues.Venue
Sets the percentage of seats allocated to the Reserved section.
setSilverPercent(int) - Method in class model.venues.Venue
Sets the percentage of seats allocated to the Silver section.
setTime(String) - Method in class model.events.Event
Sets the scheduled time of this event.
setType(String) - Method in class model.events.Event
Sets the type of this event.
setType(String) - Method in class model.venues.Venue
Sets the type of this venue.
setUserID(int) - Method in class model.users.User
Sets the unique numeric identifier for this user.
setUsername(String) - Method in class model.users.User
Sets the username for this user.
setUserType(String) - Method in class model.users.User
Sets the role/type of this user.
setVipPercent(int) - Method in class model.venues.Venue
Sets the percentage of seats allocated to the VIP section.
Special - Class in model.events
 
Special(int, String, String, String, String, double, double, double, double, double) - Constructor for class model.events.Special
Constructs a Special event with the specified scheduling and pricing details.
Sport - Class in model.events
 
Sport(int, String, String, String, String, double, double, double, double, double) - Constructor for class model.events.Sport
Constructs a Sport event with the specified scheduling and pricing details.
Stadium - Class in model.venues
Represents a Stadium venue in the TicketMiner system.
Stadium() - Constructor for class model.venues.Stadium
Constructs a default Stadium with no initial field values.
Stadium(int, String, String, int, int, double, int, int, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class model.venues.Stadium
Constructs a Stadium with the specified identity, capacity, cost, and seating section percentages.

T

toString() - Method in class model.events.Event
Returns a formatted string representation of this event including ID, name, date, and all ticket prices.
toString() - Method in class model.users.Customer
Returns a formatted string representation of this customer, including inherited user fields plus available funds, membership status, and number of events attended.
toString() - Method in class model.users.User
Returns a formatted string representation of this user including ID, full name, username, and type.
toString() - Method in class model.venues.Venue
Returns a formatted string representation of this venue including ID, name, type, capacities, cost, and all seating section percentages.

U

updateEvent() - Method in class RunTicketMiner
Looks up an event by ID, name, or date and presents options to update its name, date, or time.
updateUser() - Method in class RunTicketMiner
Looks up a user by ID, username, or full name and presents options to change their name, username, or password.
updateVenue() - Method in class RunTicketMiner
Looks up a venue by ID, name, or type and presents options to update its name, cost, or capacity.
User - Class in model.users
Abstract base class representing a generic user in the TicketMiner system.
User() - Constructor for class model.users.User
Constructs a default User with no initial field values.
User(int, String, String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class model.users.User
Constructs a User with the specified identity and authentication details.
utility - package utility
 

V

Venue - Class in model.venues
Abstract base class representing a generic venue in the TicketMiner system.
Venue() - Constructor for class model.venues.Venue
Constructs a default Venue with no initial field values.
Venue(int, String, String, int, int, double, int, int, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class model.venues.Venue
Constructs a Venue with the specified identity, capacity, cost, and seating section percentages.
viewEvent() - Method in class RunTicketMiner
Displays a sub-menu allowing the admin to list all events or search for a specific event by ID, name, or date.
viewUser() - Method in class RunTicketMiner
Displays a sub-menu allowing the admin to either list all users or search for a specific user by ID, username, or full name.
viewVenue() - Method in class RunTicketMiner
Displays a sub-menu allowing the admin to list all venues or search for a specific venue by ID, name, or type.

W

writeEvent(String, HashMap<Integer, Event>) - Method in class utility.DataManager
Writes all events in the provided map to a new CSV file.
writeUsers(String, HashMap<String, User>) - Method in class utility.DataManager
Writes all users in the provided map to a new CSV file.
writeVenues(String, HashMap<Integer, Venue>) - Method in class utility.DataManager
Writes all venues in the provided map to a new CSV file.
